buffer_node(3) Library Functions Manual buffer_node(3)

NAME

buffer_node - Node header embedded before user data.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/buffer_pool.h>

Data Fields


uint32_t magic
Magic to identify pooled buffers. uint32_t _pad
Padding for alignment. size_t size
Size of user data portion. atomic_ptr_t next
Next in free list (lock-free). atomic_t returned_at_ns
Timestamp when returned to free list (nanoseconds). struct buffer_pool * pool
Owning pool (for free).

Detailed Description

Node header embedded before user data.

Layout in memory: [buffer_node_t header][user data...] ^-- pointer returned to caller

Definition at line 71 of file buffer_pool.h.
